    B

    back() - Method in class GameEngine
     

    C

    Command - Class in Unnamed Package
    Command class - represents a single user command in the game.
    Command(String, String) - Constructor for class Command
    Creates a command with the given main word and second word.
    CommandWords - Class in Unnamed Package
    CommandWords class - stores all valid command words for the "Henriette's Feast" game and provides a way to check them.
    CommandWords() - Constructor for class CommandWords
     
    createGUI() - Method in class UserInterface
    Creates the graphical user interface.
    createRooms() - Method in class GameEngine
    Creates all rooms of the village and connects them with exits.

    E

    eat() - Method in class GameEngine
    Permet au joueur de "manger".
    enable(boolean) - Method in class UserInterface
    Enables or disables command input.
    endGame() - Method in class GameEngine
    Ends the game by printing a goodbye message and disabling input.

    G

    Game - Class in Unnamed Package
    Game class - the main engine of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
    Game() - Constructor for class Game
    Creates the game, initializes the rooms and the parser, then starts the game loop.
    GameEngine - Class in Unnamed Package
    Décrivez votre classe GameEngine ici.
    GameEngine() - Constructor for class GameEngine
     
    getCommand(String) - Method in class Parser
     
    getCommandList() - Method in class CommandWords
    Returns all valid command words in a single string.
    getCommandList() - Method in class Parser
    Returns the list of all valid command words as a single string.
    getCommandWord() - Method in class Command
    Returns the main command word.
    getCommandWords() - Method in class Parser
    Gives access to the set of valid command words.
    getDescription() - Method in class Item
     
    getDescription() - Method in class Room
    Returns the description of this room.
    getExit(String) - Method in class Room
    Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null if there is no exit in that direction.
    getExitString() - Method in class Room
    Builds and returns a string listing all available exits from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
    getImageName() - Method in class Room
     
    getItem(String) - Method in class Room
     
    getItemString() - Method in class Room
     
    getLongDescription() - Method in class Item
     
    getLongDescription() - Method in class Room
    Returns a long description of this room, including its exits, in the form: "You are in the kitchen.
    getName() - Method in class Item
     
    getSecondWord() - Method in class Command
    Returns the second word of this command.
    getWeight() - Method in class Item
     
    goRoom(Command) - Method in class GameEngine
    Tries to go to the room in the direction given by the command.

    H

    hasSecondWord() - Method in class Command
    Checks whether this command has a second word.

    I

    interpretCommand(String) - Method in class GameEngine
    Interprets and executes the given command line.
    isCommand(String) - Method in class CommandWords
    Checks whether a given string is a valid command word.
    isUnknown() - Method in class Command
    Checks whether this command is unknown (no valid command word).
    Item - Class in Unnamed Package
    Décrivez votre classe Item ici.
    Item(String, String, int) - Constructor for class Item
     

    L

    look() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints a detailed description of the current room, including its exits.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Game
     

    P

    Parser - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class is part of the "World of Zuul" application.
    Parser() - Constructor for class Parser
    Constructeur par defaut qui cree les 2 objets prevus pour les attributs
    print(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Prints text in the text area.
    printHelp() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints a help message describing the game objective and the available commands.
    println(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Prints text in the text area followed by a line break.
    printLocationInfo() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints the current room description and its available exits.
    printWelcome() - Method in class GameEngine
    Prints the welcome text and the initial location information.
    processCommand() - Method in class UserInterface
    Reads the command entered by the user and sends it to the game engine.

    R

    Room - Class in Unnamed Package
    Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game.
    Room(String, String) - Constructor for class Room
    Creates a room with the given description and no exits yet.

    S

    setExit(String, Room) - Method in class Room
    Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.
    setGUI(UserInterface) - Method in class GameEngine
    Stores the graphical user interface and prints the welcome message.
    showImage(String) - Method in class UserInterface
    Displays an image in the interface.

    U

    UserInterface - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class implements a simple graphical user interface with a text entry area, a text output area and an optional image.
    UserInterface(GameEngine) - Constructor for class UserInterface
    Constructs a UserInterface linked to the given game engine.
